summary.original: Use when testing, debugging, or making targeted improvements to rendered frontend apps through the Build Web Apps or web dev plugin: local dev servers, UI regressions, interaction bugs, console errors, responsive layout, and visual QA. Check whether the Browser plugin is available and use it first when it is; otherwise use regular Playwright with the recorded reason.
summary.zhCN: 通过 Build Web Apps 或 web dev 插件测试、调试和针对性改进已渲染的前端应用，覆盖本地服务器、UI 回归、交互错误、控制台错误、响应式布局与视觉 QA；Browser 可用时必须优先使用。

description.original: Use when testing, debugging, or making targeted improvements to rendered frontend apps through the Build Web Apps or web dev plugin: local dev servers, UI regressions, interaction bugs, console errors, responsive layout, and visual QA. Check whether the Browser plugin is available and use it first when it is; otherwise use regular Playwright with the recorded reason. Official skill document adapted by Agent-OPT as a dedicated bilingual Web skill studio with section navigation, full-text search, and sandboxed source rendering. No upstream executable scripts are executed.
description.zhCN: 通过 Build Web Apps 或 web dev 插件测试、调试和针对性改进已渲染的前端应用，覆盖本地服务器、UI 回归、交互错误、控制台错误、响应式布局与视觉 QA；Browser 可用时必须优先使用，否则记录原因后使用普通 Playwright。Agent-OPT 将固定版本的官方 SKILL.md 及完整简体中文译文适配为专属 Web 技能工作室，支持任务执行手册、章节导航、全文检索和沙箱化只读渲染；不执行上游脚本，也不访问外部账号。

evidence.note: Pinned path-addressed SKILL.md from the official repository snapshot with content SHA ef1203a0f13dfac578bca75139c6ffdfafa730d3.
License evidence from the official repository path for this skill or its parent plugin manifest.

license.evidence: Primary-source license identifier MIT recorded from plugins/build-web-apps/.codex-plugin/plugin.json. Agent-OPT stores a local review copy of SKILL.md for Web rendering and does not execute upstream scripts.

name.zhCN: 准备任务专属 Agent 执行手册

description.original: Rank the pinned skill sections against a bounded user objective and context, then produce an agent prompt, checklist, or reference pack without executing upstream scripts.
description.zhCN: 根据有界的用户目标和上下文，对固定版本技能的各章节进行相关性排序，然后在不执行上游脚本的前提下生成 Agent 提示词、检查清单或参考资料包。

description.original: Open the full official skill document with structured sections.
description.zhCN: 以结构化章节打开完整官方技能文档。

description.original: Keyword search across the skill body with line-level excerpts.
description.zhCN: 在技能正文中做关键词检索并返回行级摘录。

description.original: Jump between markdown headings and inspect one section at a time.
description.zhCN: 在 Markdown 标题之间跳转，并按章节查看内容。

description.original: List and safely preview text references, scripts, templates, and licenses captured from the exact upstream commit and recorded in BUNDLE.json.

notes: The in-process adapter reads only the curated original/Chinese bodies and BUNDLE.json-listed supporting files under this skill directory.
Supporting paths must match the fixed hash manifest; traversal, unknown files, symlinks, binary previews, and files above 400KB are rejected.
Upstream scripts and external services are not executed by this Web adaptation.
Selected in the quality-first priority tranche with exact official source and license provenance.
Complete Simplified Chinese body preserves frontmatter, heading hierarchy, code, inline tokens, links, and URLs; validation is automated.
The dedicated profile configures task examples, labels, context, output artifact, bilingual source, and pinned resource workflow for this skill.
Lifecycle is web-ready; verified remains reserved for a passing real Chromium report and any separately executable upstream workflow evidence.
Complete Simplified Chinese translation: catalog/skill-bodies/skill-frontend-testing-debugging/SKILL.zh-CN.md; the original SKILL.md remains unchanged.
Frontmatter keys, fenced code blocks, commands, paths, links, and technical identifiers were preserved during review.

features: 前端测试或调试任务 with two skill-specific task examples
页面、症状与运行环境 and bounded private context input
前端调试验证包 in agent-prompt, checklist, and reference-pack modes
complete Simplified Chinese and original SKILL.md switch
relevance-ranked official sections with outline, search, and full-text reader
pinned supporting-file browser backed by BUNDLE.json hashes
runtime activity and controlled validation feedback
dedicatedElements: 前端测试或调试任务 input
页面、症状与运行环境 panel
前端调试验证包 result view

tests.evidence: skill-frontend-testing-debugging: original and complete Chinese bodies opened through skill_open; skill_prepare returned ranked sections, prompt, and checklist; outline/search remained available.
skill-frontend-testing-debugging: the capability-specific profile objective and context ran in Chinese through skill_prepare and returned a non-empty task artifact.
skill-frontend-testing-debugging: empty objectives, unknown fields/sections, invalid locale, traversal, and missing supporting assets were rejected with InvocationValidationError.

runner=playwright; browser=chromium; report=var/test-results/playwright.json; testIds=skills.spec.ts › priority Agent Skill browser workflows › @web-e2e [skill-frontend-testing-debugging] runs bilingual task, source, asset, and failure workflows; route=/plugins/skill-frontend-testing-debugging; result=passed
skill-frontend-testing-debugging: source bundle hashes and containment were checked; the adapter only reads curated files and grants no network, commands, secrets, or accounts.

blockers: The shipped bilingual Web adaptation is verified; optional upstream scripts and downstream agent outcomes are outside this adapter and are not claimed as executed.
